name: Launch AI Startup AI Business
description: Complete roadmap for launching a sovereign AI agents platform for client infrastructure

goals.title: Launch AI Startup
goals.description: Launch a fully functional AI agents platform with public availability and documentation

priority.reason: Core business objective with market opportunity

goals.motivation: Build the foundational infrastructure for sovereign AI agents on client infrastructure
successCriteria: Documentation covering core concepts and API
Landing page with clear value proposition

goals.title: Build Landing Page
goals.description: Create professional landing page showcasing AI Startup's capabilities and value proposition

priority.reason: Critical for first impression and user acquisition

goals.motivation: Convert visitors to users and generate leads
successCriteria: Clear CTA for GitHub and documentation

goals.title: Write Manifesto Blog Post
goals.description: Write compelling 3000-word manifesto explaining why intent graphs are necessary and how GoalOS solves the problem

priority.reason: Establishes thought leadership and differentiates from competitors

goals.motivation: Help the market understand the problem we're solving
successCriteria: 2500+ words covering problem, solution, use cases
Published on main website and Medium
Shared in relevant communities (HN, Reddit, Twitter)
Clear narrative arc and compelling tone

goals.title: Set Up Payments & Monetization
goals.description: Implement payment infrastructure for future commercial offerings

priority.reason: Important for long-term viability but not blocking launch

goals.motivation: Enable revenue generation for enterprise customers

dependencies.description: Need landing page to showcase pricing

goals.title: Community Outreach & Partnerships
goals.description: Build partnerships and awareness through community engagement

priority.reason: Early users and feedback are critical for product-market fit

goals.motivation: Get early adopters and generate word-of-mouth momentum
successCriteria: Guest posts on 2+ major tech blogs

dependencies.description: Need compelling story to pitch partnerships

goals.title: Claude Desktop Integration Demo
goals.description: Create working demo of GoalOS integrated with Claude Desktop via MCP

priority.reason: Primary demo for launch and differentiation

goals.motivation: Show practical value and ease of integration
successCriteria: Claude can read and update goals
